# FinMango

> FinMango is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit (EIN 81-2543425, founded 2017) building economic mobility infrastructure for young adults and vulnerable communities. We use data and technology to fix the systemic barriers blocking financial health and upward mobility — through research, education, and advocacy. Our work has reached 10M+ people across 100+ countries, in partnership with organizations including Google Health, WHO, the World Bank, and the IMF.

Key facts:
- Mission: financial health is a right, not a privilege.
- Research: exclusive Google Trends API access powers real-time financial health indicators used by international organizations.
- Education: free lessons, calculators, and interactive tools that have educated 100K+ students.
- Advocacy: a global ambassador program empowering young leaders.
- All content on this site is free and public. Citation and linking are welcome.

## Core pages

- [About](https://www.finmango.org/about): Mission, team, and history of FinMango
- [Our Approach](https://www.finmango.org/approach): Methodology behind our programs
- [Research](https://www.finmango.org/research): Research initiatives and real-time financial health data
- [Education](https://www.finmango.org/education): Free financial education programs and lessons
- [Get Involved](https://www.finmango.org/get-involved): Volunteer and partnership opportunities
- [Donate](https://www.finmango.org/donate): Support FinMango's work

## Research & data

- [Financial Health Barometer](https://www.finmango.org/barometer): Real-time, state-by-state US financial health indicators built on Google Trends data, updated daily
- [Barometer Validation](https://www.finmango.org/barometer-validation): External validation of the barometer methodology
- [Housing Policy Lab](https://www.finmango.org/housing-policy-lab): Housing affordability research and policy analysis
- [Affordability Lab](https://www.finmango.org/affordability-lab): Cost-of-living and affordability analysis
- [AI Economic Signal](https://www.finmango.org/ai-economic-signal): Tracking AI's impact on economic wellbeing
- [Intelligence Platform](https://www.finmango.org/intelligence-platform): Financial health intelligence and reporting
- [COVID-19 Open Data Project](https://www.finmango.org/covid-19-open-data-project): Global open data collaboration with Google

## Education & lessons

- [Budget Lessons](https://www.finmango.org/budget-lessons): Budgeting fundamentals
- [Credit Lessons](https://www.finmango.org/credit-lessons): Understanding and building credit
- [Investing Lessons](https://www.finmango.org/investing-lessons): Investing fundamentals
- [College Lessons](https://www.finmango.org/college-lessons): Paying for college and student finances
- [Crypto Lessons](https://www.finmango.org/crypto-lessons): Cryptocurrency basics and risks
- [Real Estate Lessons](https://www.finmango.org/real-estate-lessons): Home buying and real estate
- [Entrepreneurial Lessons](https://www.finmango.org/entrepreneurial-lessons): Starting and running a business
- [Small Business Guide](https://www.finmango.org/small-business-guide-lessons): Small business finances

## Free tools & calculators

- [FIRE Calculator](https://www.finmango.org/fire-calculator): Financial independence / early retirement planning
- [Rent vs Buy](https://www.finmango.org/rent-vs-buy): Compare renting and buying a home
- [Housing Calculator](https://www.finmango.org/housing-calculator): Housing affordability
- [Roth IRA Calculator](https://www.finmango.org/roth-ira-calculator): Retirement account growth
- [Compound Interest](https://www.finmango.org/compound-interest): Compound growth visualizer
- [Paycheck Calculator](https://www.finmango.org/paycheck-calculator): Take-home pay estimator
- [Student Loan Simulator](https://www.finmango.org/student-loan-simulator): Student debt payoff scenarios
- [Debt Destroyer](https://www.finmango.org/debt-destroyer): Debt payoff planning
- [Food Assistance Calculator](https://www.finmango.org/food-assistance-calculator): SNAP and food benefit estimates
- [AI-Ready Toolkit](https://www.finmango.org/ai-ready/): Preparing financially for AI-driven job changes

## Programs

- [Barrier Breakers](https://www.finmango.org/barrier-breakers): Annual innovation challenge for students
- [Global Ambassadors](https://www.finmango.org/ambassadors): Youth ambassador program
- [Mango Stories](https://www.finmango.org/mango-stories): Community financial stories
